news.headline: Taylor Machine Works and Proterra partner to power electric port and industrial equipment; batteries will be used for ZLC and ZEC-series container handlers, ZRS-series reach stackers, and ZH-series forklifts.
news.summary: In Burlingame, California, Taylor Machine Works and Proterra have joined forces in a new agreement to equip Taylor’s ZLC and ZEC-series electric container handlers, ZRS-series reach stackers, and ZH-series electric forklifts with Proterra's cutting-edge battery technology. This partnership aims to enhance the performance and efficiency of port and industrial machinery. Chris Bailey, CEO of Proterra, expressed excitement about the collaboration, marking a significant step forward in utilizing sustainable energy solutions in the sector.

news.headline: Walrus Protocol redefines storage with innovative data encoding, enabling AI, websites, and social media. #DecentralizedStorage
news.summary: A groundbreaking data encoding algorithm within the decentralized storage protocol is set to revolutionize various sectors like AI, websites, and social media. The innovative algorithm is expected to unlock a plethora of new applications and possibilities in the digital realm.

news.headline: Convoy of Hope aiding Florida following Hurricane Milton landfall. Teams pre-positioned for disaster relief efforts.
news.summary: In Springfield, Missouri on October 10, 2024, Convoy of Hope has been assisting survivors in Florida following the landfall of Hurricane Milton near Sarasota. Prior to this disaster, the organization's teams were already present in the state to aid in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene. They were strategically positioned with essential relief supplies to promptly address the needs of those affected by the consecutive natural disasters.

news.headline: Inns of Monterey offer autumn savings in Monterey with vibrant activities like hiking & historic walks.
news.summary: In Monterey, California, as of October 10, 2024, the fall season is celebrated for its beauty and activities. Visitors can enjoy the coastal scenery and engaging autumn experiences. One highlight is hiking the picturesque trails of Point Lobos and exploring the historic Cannery Row, once walked by renowned author John Steinbeck. This seasonal celebration is an opportunity to immerse in the charms of Monterey and its various attractions.

news.headline: Isaac Greszes joins Mobile Health as General Manager of Home Care, leveraging expertise to enhance compliance and growth. NYC, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Isaac Greszes, with his extensive expertise in home care and healthcare technology, has been appointed as the General of Mobile Health, effective October 10, 2024. His leadership will focus on ensuring compliance, fostering innovation, and promoting growth for the company's home care clientele in New York.

news.headline: Pendo's eighth Pendomonium festival draws 2,000 leaders, announces 7 new features and acquisition of Product Collective.
news.summary: A recent product festival held in Raleigh, North Carolina on October 10, 2024, saw a significant turnout of 2,000 prominent product and digital leaders. Pendo, known for its comprehensive product experience platform, concluded its eighth annual Pendomonium event with this record-breaking attendance.

news.headline: First case of Mpox reported in Zambia as infections rise across Africa.
Medicinal cannabis producer Bedrocan returning to Canada by purchasing facility in Scarborough, ON.
news.summary: A well-established producer of pharmaceutical-grade medicinal cannabis, Bedrocan International has re-entered the Canadian medicinal cannabis market, currently holding the title as the most experienced in the field globally. The company recently acquired a facility in Scarborough, which was previously used as the headquarters of another cannabis producer. This move comes after Bedrocan International successfully closed the deal in Veendam, Netherlands on October 10, 2024. The company's expansion into the Canadian market is significant given its expertise and experience, showcasing a commitment to providing high-quality medicinal cannabis products.

news.headline: Allegheny College receives $1 million grant from Richard King Mellon Foundation for Meadville revitalization.
news.summary: An innovative initiative has been launched in Meadville, Pennsylvania on October 10, 2024, with the objective of rejuvenating downtown Meadville. The focus of this initiative will be on startup ventures and redevelopment projects to breathe new life into the area. Allegheny College, a renowned institution known for its multidisciplinary approach to education, is spearheading this effort. Founded in 1815, Allegheny College is revered for its innovative educational practices and is committed to supporting revitalization efforts in downtown Meadville. This initiative aims to stimulate economic growth and bring about positive change in the community by fostering new beginnings and encouraging entrepreneurship. This strategic move comes at a crucial time for Meadville, as revitalization efforts are essential for the city's growth and revitalization. By emphasizing startup ventures and redevelopment activities, this initiative seeks to create opportunities for growth and development, ultimately leading to a more vibrant downtown area.

news.headline: It's A 10® Haircare awards 10 women entrepreneurs $10K each, totaling $100,000 on the 8th National Love Your Hair Day.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Miami, Founder and CEO of It's A 10 Haircare, Carolyn Aronson, announced that 10 women entrepreneurs will each receive $10,000. This support aims to boost the growth of their businesses in celebration of the 8th Annual National Love Your Hair Day. This initiative is part of Aronson's commitment to empowering women-owned businesses and fostering their success.

news.headline: Volleyball legend Misty May-Treanor joins Upper Deck as exclusive spokesperson for sports collectibles.
news.summary: CARLSBAD, California - On October 10, 2024, Upper Deck, the renowned sports and entertainment collectibles brand, unveiled its latest addition to the UDA premium memorabilia collection. This assortment prominently features volleyball and women's sports memorabilia. The company secured an exclusive deal for trading cards and memorabilia. This move reflects the increasing popularity of volleyball and women's sports in the collectibles market.

news.headline: Greystar and GMC Projects break ground on Birchway Angle Lake in Seattle, marking their partnership in real estate development.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Seattle, Greystar, a prominent company in real estate investment, development, and management of various properties such as rental housing, logistics, and life sciences, has joined forces with GMC Projects, a real estate developer based in Canada. This partnership is set to bring forth significant ventures in the real estate sector, marking a notable collaboration in this industry.

news.headline: Sensorium Therapeutics showcases promising data on lead assets targeting anxiety & epilepsy at Neuroscience 2024. Preparing for clinical trials in early 2025. #Biotech #Anxiety #Epilepsy #Innovation
news.summary: Sensorium Therapeutics, a biotechnology company, has reported promising preclinical data on their lead assets and discovery platform. They are on track to enter the clinic in early 2025. Based in Boston, as of October 10, 2024, the company is focusing on developing innovative medicines. This progress demonstrates their commitment to advancing medical research.

news.headline: X-Bolt Orthopedics performs first U.S. implant of Pro-X1® Trochanteric Nailing System, revolutionary hip fracture treatment.
news.summary: In Dublin on October 10, 2024, X-Bolt Orthopedics revealed a pioneering hip fracture treatment utilizing their innovative expanding bolt technology. The company completed the first U.S. implant of their Pro-X1®, marking a significant milestone in orthopedic trauma devices. This development showcases the cutting-edge solutions offered by X-Bolt, which aims to revolutionize hip fracture treatments.

news.headline: Global market for sustainable plastic packaging to grow from $86.6B in 2024 to $122.4B by 2029, 7.2% CAGR. Demand rises due to green packaging push.
news.summary: A recent study by BCC Research predicts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.2%, leading to an increase in the global market size from $86.6 billion in 2024 to $122.4 billion by 2029. This growth is primarily fueled by the worldwide emphasis on green packaging, with factors like tax breaks and rising demand for bioplastics driving a shift towards sustainable solutions. The study was conducted in Boston and indicates a significant trend towards environmentally-friendly packaging options in the near future.

news.headline: Jewett-Cameron changes NASDAQ symbol for common shares (Nasdaq: JCTCF) for innovative outdoor products.
news.summary: North Plains, Oregon - On October 8, 2024, Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd. announced its decision to change its NASDAQ trading symbol for its common shares. Jewett-Cameron, listed as (Nasdaq: JCTCF), a company specializing in innovative outdoor products, made this move to enhance trading visibility and market recognition.

news.headline: Navy Federal introduces cashRewards Plus credit card, offering members unlimited 2% cash back on all purchases.
news.summary: In Vienna, Virginia, Navy Federal Credit Union unveiled its latest offering, the cashRewards Plus credit card, designed to provide members with enhanced rewards for their daily spending. This new card guarantees a generous 2% cash back on all purchases, setting it apart as a strong choice for individuals seeking cash back benefits. By extending these exclusive advantages, Navy Federal remains dedicated to supporting military personnel and their families, solidifying its reputation for delivering exceptional value.

news.headline: Dow Jones and Nasdaq rise, Nvidia gains in buy area, while China stocks sell off on stimulus news.
news.summary: Following a decline on Monday, major indexes showed an increase. Nvidia's stocks rose and reached a buy area. Meanwhile, Chinese stocks experienced a sell-off due to news of stimulus measures. The Dow Jones saw a slight dip while the Nasdaq remained strong. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily without mentioning the source.

news.headline: Emmy-winning documentary "Playing Like a Girl: The House That Rob Built" airs Nov 1 on PBS, focusing on Lady Griz hoops.
news.summary: A celebrated Emmy Award-winning documentary produced by Family Theater Productions chronicles the establishment of the renowned Lady Griz basketball team at the University of Montana. Titled "Playing Like a Girl: The House That Rob Built," the film provides a compelling narrative about the team's inception. The powerhouse team's journey is depicted in this film, which has gained recognition for its quality storytelling. The documentary, released on October 10, 2024, has garnered significant attention for its unique portrayal of the Lady Griz basketball team's history.

news.headline: Research report on US Defense Training and Simulation Industry projects growth opportunities in the sector from 2024-2029, highlighting future spending estimates and notable programs. Key focus on Air Force, Navy, Army and Joint Agencies. Companies identified.
news.summary: A new report on the US Defense Training and Simulation Industry covering the period from 2024 to 2029 has been released. The report, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, offers an analysis of the industry, outlining growth drivers, restraints, and opportunities. It includes a forecast detailing future spending estimates and provides insight into key programs. The study also examines current trends and profiles various companies operating in the sector. This comprehensive overview aims to provide valuable information on the US defense training and simulation industry to stakeholders and interested parties.

news.headline: SNB's Vice Chairman Martin: We don't have a balance sheet objective by itself.
Reading Horizons® endorsed by CASE for 3 more years, validating commitment to special education literacy.
news.summary: In Kaysville, Utah, Reading Horizons® has received a three-year endorsement from the Council of Administrators of Special Education (CASE) for its literacy products. The endorsement, lasting from September 19, 2024, to September 19, 2027, highlights Reading Horizons’ dedication to delivering impactful literacy solutions for special education professionals and students. This reaffirmation underscores the company’s ongoing commitment to excellence in the field of special education.

news.headline: Valerion debuts VisionMaster Series, the 1st RGB laser projector with OpticFlex Lens System, now available on Kickstarter.
news.summary: In Denver, Valerion, a brand affiliated with AWOL Vision, introduced its new innovative RGB laser projector, the Valerion VisionMaster Series, at the IFA 2024 event. After a successful debut, the VisionMaster Series is now available for crowdfunding on Kickstarter. This groundbreaking projector is the pioneer in showcasing the OpticFlex Lens System of professional standards, operated by the advanced AI-SoC MT9618. Currently, Valerion has released four models of the VisionMaster on Kickstarter, catering to different consumer needs.

news.headline: Wysa launches multilingual AI safety initiative to evaluate Large Language Models for mental health support globally.
news.summary: A global initiative has been launched by Wysa in Boston to assess the safety of multilingual Large Language Models in mental health. The project aims to collaborate with partners worldwide to guarantee cultural relevance.

news.headline: COVU raises $12.5M in Series A funding to transform insurance agencies with AI and human support, improving operations.
news.summary: In San Francisco, COVU has successfully raised $12.5 million in Series A funding. This investment is aimed at transforming insurance agencies by leveraging AI technology and human support to improve operational efficiency and enhance customer experiences.

news.headline: TechTarget introduces Priority Engine Demand to assist B2B tech orgs in identifying, engaging, and converting buying groups faster.
news.summary: TechTarget recently released Priority Engine Demand, a new module within its Priority Engine intent platform. This tool is designed to assist B2B technology organizations in speeding up their buying group strategies.

news.headline: NVIDIA creates AI Tech Community in Pittsburgh with top universities, aiming to boost AI development.
news.summary: NVIDIA has established its inaugural AI Tech Community in Pittsburgh, joining forces with Carnegie Mellon University and the University of Pittsburgh to propel advancements in AI technology. This collaboration aims to foster innovation and knowledge sharing in the field of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: 5th annual ProS Who Know virtual event on Oct 28-29 to discuss shipping strategies for success in 2025. Learn from experts.
news.summary: Attend ProShip's upcoming ProS Who Know Virtual Event on October 28-29 in Brookfield, Wisconsin. Gain insights from leading industry professionals, explore the latest shipping trends, and enhance your operational efficiency. Join this informative event to stay abreast of the latest developments in the industry.

news.headline: Partnership: Yale, Moderna, and NVIDIA to use quantum computing for drug discovery, focusing on GPU-accelerated simulation.
news.summary: Yale University, along with Moderna and NVIDIA, are teaming up to harness the power of quantum machine learning in order to revolutionize the field of drug discovery. This exciting partnership will center on utilizing GPU-accelerated technology to simulate quantum algorithms aimed at predicting molecular properties more effectively. The collaboration between these entities signifies a groundbreaking approach to advancing research in the pharmaceutical industry, potentially leading to significant advancements in drug development.

news.headline: OKI partners with 27pilots to address social issues using venture client model, integrating global tech. #OKI #27pilots
news.summary: In Tokyo, OKI, listed as TOKYO: 6703, is embracing the venture client model ("VCM") that is on the rise in Europe and the US. This move aims to swiftly tackle intricate societal problems by integrating cutting-edge global technologies into its strategies. With dedicated procedures and an internal framework for VCM deployment in place, OKI has initiated collaboration with 27pilots Deloitte GmbH, headquartered in Munich, Germany.

news.headline: French consumers expected to drive growth while investments remain low.
The world is being exploited by the ultra-rich using legal gaps.
Kohl’s (NYSE: KSS) plans for holidays: more gifts, affordable prices, new in-store experiences, deals weekly in November/December.
news.summary: Kohl’s (NYSE: KSS) in Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin, has announced its holiday season strategy to provide affordable gifts and a fresh shopping experience. The retail giant will offer new in-store collections and consistent value during November and December, with weekly discounts. CEO Nick Jone stated that Kohl’s aims to assist families during the hectic holiday season by offering a variety of products for decorating, gifting, and hosting celebrations. The company plans to cater to shoppers' needs while maintaining low prices and special deals throughout the festive period.

news.headline: MITRE & Mcity introduce digital testing ground for AVs, with NVIDIA's Omniverse Cloud Sensor RTX APIs to boost safety.
news.summary: MITRE has collaborated with Mcity to establish a virtual testing environment for self-driving vehicles. This partnership incorporates NVIDIA's Omniverse Cloud Sensor RTX APIs to improve the safety evaluation processes for autonomous vehicles. The initiative aims to leverage advanced technologies to enhance the development and testing of autonomous vehicles, ensuring their safety and efficiency.

news.headline: Global market report on advanced materials for 3D printing technologies by 2024. Includes major players like Stratasys, Proto Labs, and Desktop Metal.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on "Advanced Materials for 3D Printing: Technologies and Global Markets" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The comprehensive report offers a detailed qualitative and quantitative analysis of the global market for advanced materials used in 3D printing. There is a growing demand for these materials on a global scale, driven by the expanding applications of 3D printing in prototyping. The market for advanced materials for 3D printing is experiencing robust growth, with increasing utilization of 3D printing technologies.

news.headline: Global intelligent parcel locker market expected to grow at 12.6% CAGR, reaching $2,450.5 million by 2031 from $732.8 million in 2021.
news.summary: Allied Market Research released a report on the global intelligent parcel locker market, stating its size was $732.8 million in 2021 and is expected to reach $2,450.5 million by 2031, with a CAGR of 12.6% from 2022 to 2031. The growth is primarily attributed to the rising online shopping trends and the need for efficient parcel delivery solutions. Integration with smart technology is also fueling market expansion. However, the high initial installation and maintenance costs are hindering market adoption. Subscription-based delivery services are predicted to offer growth opportunities. The forecast period covered is 2021-2031.

news.headline: Stock market at new high, selling after hot CPI data: Headline CPI at 0.2% vs. 0.1%, Core CPI at 0.3% vs. 0.2%. Jobless claims at 258K vs. 229K, may impact Fed rate decisions. Fed criticized for 50 bps cut.
news.summary: The stock market reached a new high but showed selling post the release of economic data indicating higher than expected Consumer Price Index (CPI) figures. The headline CPI was at 0.2% versus the 0.1% consensus, while the Core CPI stood at 0.3% against the 0.2% consensus. Despite this, initial jobless claims rose to 258K against the 229K consensus, potentially leading to Fed rate cuts in light of the inflation uptick. The Fed may have made a mistake with the 50 bps cut, as per FOMC members' dissension revealed post Powell's decision. More on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Opportunity worth $3.4 trillion in extracting metals from mine waste.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.4%. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to the addition of 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth has surged by 6.2% in the first quarter of the year, reflecting a strong economic recovery. These positive indicators suggest a promising outlook for the economy, with consumer spending also showing a steady increase of 3.5% compared to the previous year. The stock market has responded positively to these developments, with the main index rising by 2.5% in response to the robust economic data. Analysts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, bolstered by the government's fiscal measures to support businesses and stimulate economic growth.

news.headline: SNB's Vice Chairman Martin: I currently don't see need to take rate below 0%.
Market hours to be affected by upcoming Indigenous Peoples’ Day/Columbus Day.
SNB Vice Chairman Martin: There are no plans to use negative interest rates at the moment.
Vincent Gelle is now the Deputy CEO of Mobilize Financial Services, the commercial brand of RCI Banque.
September CPI is 2.4%, slightly below last month's 2.5%. Core CPI up 3.3% from last year. Food inflation at 2.4%. Energy prices down, impacting CPI.
news.summary: The September Consumer Price Index (CPI) report indicates an overall increase of 2.4% over the past year and 0.2% for the month, slightly below the previous month's 2.5%. The Core CPI, excluding food and energy, rose by 3.3% compared to last year and 0.3% from the previous month, above expectations by 0.1%. Food inflation was at 2.4%, with food at home up by 1.3% and food away from home up by 3.9%. Energy prices decreased, with gasoline down by 15.3% and fuel oil down by 22.4% compared to last year. The report suggests a mixed trend in consumer prices, with ongoing concerns about rising food costs creating stress for many households. Energy prices have been a significant factor in keeping the overall CPI from rising higher.

news.headline: High CPI inflation does not prevent potential Fed rate cut on Nov. 7 due to rise in jobless claims; S&P 500 dips from record high.
news.summary: Despite a high consumer price index data, a potential Federal Reserve rate cut on Nov. 7 is not hindered by a rise in jobless claims. The S&P 500 decreased from its previous record high. The likelihood of a rate cut is increasing despite the hot CPI inflation.

news.headline: CIM Group expands with a 55,673 sq ft creative office at 3000 Crenshaw Blvd in central LA.
news.summary: A boutique creative office building spanning 55,673 square feet has been introduced to central Los Angeles by CIM Group at 3000 Crenshaw Blvd.

news.headline: General Pump Company in San Dimas merges with Water Well Solutions to become top water pump service company.
news.summary: SAN DIMAS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The top water well pump services companies in Southern California, Illinois, and Wisconsin are consolidating, with key leadership additions.

news.headline: Applied Digital Corporation (APLD) beat Q1 FY2025 expectations, citing increased revenue from new Cloud Services business. $160 million private placement closed. Stock trading higher after earnings report.
news.summary: Shares of Applied Digital Corporation (NASDAQ: APLD) saw an increase in trading on Thursday following the release of its first-quarter financial results. The company exceeded analyst expectations for both revenue and profit in Q1 of fiscal year 2025. This success was attributed to the introduction of its Cloud Services business towards the end of the prior fiscal year. Additionally, Applied Digital highlighted the recent completion of a $160 million private placement in September, involving institutional and accredited investors such as Nvidia Corp. The company's current stock updates include Roth MKM reiterating a Buy rating and maintaining a target price of $10, while Craig-Hallum analyst George Sutton also provided positive coverage.

news.headline: Crude oil up 3%, Nasdaq gains 0.1%, Dow down 0.17% at 42,437.66; Delta Air Lines reports downbeat earnings.
news.summary: During midday trading on Thursday, U.S. stocks showed mixed results. The Nasdaq Composite saw a slight gain of about 0.1%, reaching 18,313.25. Conversely, the Dow reported a 0.17% decrease, settling at 42,437.66. The S&P 500 also experienced a decline, dropping 0.05% to 5,789.32. Energy sector shares surged by 0.6%, while industrial sector shares fell by 0.5%. Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) released their third-quarter earnings, noting a 1% revenue growth to $15.677 billion, surpassing expectations. However, adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.50, a 26% decrease compared to the previous year and missing the consensus of $1.52. BloomZ Inc. (NASDAQ:BLMZ) observed a significant increase of 73% in their stock price, reaching $1.2350 after securing a major animation contract.

news.headline: October 8, 2024: Monthly report on total voting rights and shares for PHXM on Euronext Paris (ISIN: FR001400K4B1). Visit phaxiam.com.
news.summary: The stock is listed on Euronext Paris in Market Segment C with an ISIN Code of FR001400K4B1 and trading under the symbol PHXM. The website for more information is www.phaxiam.com.

news.headline: Mortgage rates increase to 6.32%, reported by Freddie Mac survey.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed on October 10, 2024, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage reached an average of 6.32 percent in its Primary Mortgage Market Survey®. The company, traded under the ticker OTCQB: FMCC, released this information today.
